text:
User: titles are long -- let's make each row two lines instead of one

Assistant: Agreed. I’m updating the exploration to make every session a fixed two-line item, with identity/scope on the first line and the long title/activity on the second. [...] Assistant: Agreed. Each session becomes a fixed two-line item:

```text
❯ @nova-codex  WORKING  PTY  just now  tenex-edge · #ideas · #skills-work
    Hide human-only who command from agent sessions — watching CI and preparing release
```

The highlight and `Shift+K` target both lines as one item. I’d also expand the picker beyond its current half-terminal height so the two-line layout still shows enough sessions.
